section_name: State membership in a multistate voter list maintenance organization

subsections.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, the commissioner is authorized to provide to the state’s representative to a multistate voter list maintenance organization, designated under Election Law § 5-1001 (Designating a member representative) , the following information:

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: last four digits of the DMV ID holder’s social security number;

subsections.label: h
subsections.text: email address, provided that the conditions and terms of membership are consistent with the provisions of this chapter and title ten of article five of the election law pertaining to such membership or reciprocal recognition of vehicle registrations.
The commissioner shall not knowingly provide any information pursuant to this section of persons who are not citizens.
